stories.headline: SoftBank Commits Up to 75 Billion Euros to Build 5 Gigawatts of AI Data Center Capacity in France
stories.key_takeaway: SoftBank will invest up to 75 billion euros to build 5 gigawatts of AI data center capacity in France, its largest European infrastructure commitment, with the first 3.1 GW phase targeting completion by 2031.

pull_quote.text: AI is entering a new era, and the countries that build the infrastructure for this transformation will shape the future of technology, industry and society.

stories.article_excerpt: SoftBank Group has announced what it calls its largest AI infrastructure investment in Europe: a commitment of up to 75 billion euro

stories.headline: SpaceX-xAI Launches Road Show for Largest IPO in History at $1.75 Trillion Valuation
stories.key_takeaway: SpaceX begins its IPO road show targeting a $1.75 trillion valuation and $75 billion raise, making it the largest public offering in history.

pull_quote.text: They know when to say it and when not to.

stories.headline: Alphabet Plans to Raise $80 Billion to Fund AI Infrastructure Buildout
stories.key_takeaway: Alphabet is tapping equity markets for $80 billion including a $10 billion Berkshire Hathaway placement to bankroll AI infrastructure pushing 2026 capex above $180 billion.

pull_quote.text: Compute capacity. Be it power, land, supply chain constraints: how do you ramp up to meet this extraordinary demand for this moment?

stories.article_excerpt: Google parent company Alphabet announced one of the largest equity capital raises in corporate history, unveiling plans to sell $80 bi

stories.headline: Anthropic Files Confidentially for IPO at Nearly One Trillion Dollar Valuation
stories.key_takeaway: Anthropic filed a confidential S-1 with the SEC after its $65 billion Series H round valued it at $965 billion, beating rival OpenAI to the filing stage.

pull_quote.text: I think I would rather have the largest revenue than the largest data center, because one is black on an income statement, and the other is red.

stories.article_excerpt: Anthropic, the artificial intelligence company behind the widely used Claude chatbot, confidentially filed a draft registration statem

stories.headline: GitHub Copilot Switches to Usage-Based Billing Sparking Developer Backlash Over Costs
stories.key_takeaway: GitHub Copilot switched from flat-rate subscriptions to token-based billing on June 1, triggering widespread developer backlash with some users projecting cost increases of 25x or more.

pull_quote.text: Copilot is not the same product it was a year ago. It has evolved from an in-editor assistant into an agentic platform capable of running long, multi-step coding sessions.

stories.article_excerpt: The golden age of predictable AI coding costs may be over. As of June 1, GitHub Copilot charges developers by the token inst

stories.headline: Nvidia Unveils RTX Spark Superchip Bringing AI Agent PCs to Major Manufacturers
stories.key_takeaway: Nvidia RTX Spark combines Arm CPU cores with Blackwell GPU in a single chip delivering 200 TOPS of AI compute, with systems from ASUS, Dell, HP, Lenovo, and Microsoft this fall.

pull_quote.text: We are at the beginning of a new era of computing. The PC is being reinvented as an AI computer, and RTX Spark is the engine that will power it.

stories.article_excerpt: Nvidia is making its boldest move yet into the personal computer market with RTX Spark, a new superchip designed to bring AI ag

stories.headline: AI Weather Startup WindBorne Outperforms World-Leading Government Forecasting Systems
stories.key_takeaway: WindBorne Systems AI forecasting model consistently outperforms the ECMWF gold standard, reducing five-day temperature prediction error by 18 percent using 3,000 autonomous weather balloons.

pull_quote.text: We are not incrementally better on one metric. We are systematically more accurate across the board, and we update four times more frequently than any national weather service.

stories.article_excerpt: A startup that launches weather balloons may have just upended a forecasting industry dominated by government supercomputers. Win

stories.headline: AI Boom Leaves More Than 220 Pre-ChatGPT Unicorns Stranded as Venture Funding Evaporates
stories.key_takeaway: More than 220 former unicorns have seen valuations collapse as the $250 billion AI investment wave concentrates capital in a handful of frontier AI companies.

pull_quote.text: The ChatGPT moment was when people said, holy smokes, the next generation of entrepreneurs, their coding language is spoken English.

stories.article_excerpt: The AI boom has created the wealthiest startups in history. It has also quietly destroyed hundreds of others.

stories.headline: OpenAI Promotional Rates Expire on ChatGPT Pro and Codex as Usage Returns to Standard Levels
stories.key_takeaway: OpenAI ended the 2x promotional allocation on ChatGPT Pro and halved Codex usage from 10x to 5x on June 1, signaling the end of subsidized frontier AI access.

pull_quote.text: We introduced the launch promotion to give Pro subscribers time to explore the full capabilities of our most advanced models.

stories.article_excerpt: The honeymoon pricing is officially over. As of midnight on June 1, OpenAI ended the promotional rate doubling on its $100-per-m

stories.headline: Stanford AI Index Reports Coding Benchmarks Hit Near-Perfect Scores as Adoption Reaches 88 Percent
stories.key_takeaway: Stanford 2026 AI Index shows SWE-bench coding scores rose from 60 to near 100 percent in one year while organizational AI adoption hit 88 percent, but model transparency scores plummeted from 58 to 40.

pull_quote.text: The speed of improvement we are seeing on coding and reasoning benchmarks is historically unprecedented for any technology.
pull_quote.role: Director of AI and Data Science, USC ISI

stories.article_excerpt: Artificial intelligence is no longer approaching human-level performance on technical benchmarks. It has arrived and blown past it.
